Python.description: General-purpose programming language widely used in AI/ML, data science, and backend development.
Python.importance_reason: Dominant language in AI engineering for prototyping and production ML systems

PyTorch.description: Open-source machine learning framework developed by Meta AI Research.
PyTorch.importance_reason: Preferred framework for research and production deep learning models

TensorFlow.description: End-to-end open-source platform for machine learning developed by Google.
TensorFlow.importance_reason: Widely used for production ML deployments, especially on mobile and edge

Machine Learning.description: Field of AI focused on algorithms that learn from data.
Machine Learning.importance_reason: Core competency for any AI/ML engineering role

Deep Learning.description: Subset of ML using neural networks with multiple layers.
Deep Learning.importance_reason: Foundation for modern AI systems: vision, NLP, generative AI

Computer Vision.description: Field of AI that enables machines to interpret visual data.
Computer Vision.importance_reason: Critical for roles involving image/video analysis, autonomous systems

Natural Language Processing.description: Field of AI focused on interaction between computers and human language.
Natural Language Processing.importance_reason: Foundation for chatbots, translation, text analysis, LLMs

LLM.description: Large Language Models - neural networks trained on vast text corpora.
LLM.importance_reason: Dominant technology trend in AI; required for modern AI engineering

RAG.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation - combines retrieval with LLM generation.
RAG.importance_reason: Key pattern for grounding LLMs in private/real-time data

Prompt Engineering.description: Crafting effective inputs to get optimal outputs from LLMs.
Prompt Engineering.importance_reason: Critical skill for leveraging LLMs effectively in products

Fine-tuning.description: Adapting a pre-trained model to a specific task or domain.
Fine-tuning.importance_reason: Essential for customizing foundation models to business needs

MLOps.description: Practices for deploying and maintaining ML models in production.
MLOps.importance_reason: Bridges the gap between ML research and production systems

Docker.description: Platform for containerizing applications for consistent deployment.
Docker.importance_reason: Standard tool for reproducible ML environments and deployment

Kubernetes.description: Container orchestration platform for automating deployment and scaling.
Kubernetes.importance_reason: Essential for scaling ML workloads in production

CI/CD.description: Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment practices.
CI/CD.importance_reason: Ensures reliable, automated delivery of ML systems to production

AWS.description: Amazon Web Services - leading cloud computing platform.
AWS.importance_reason: Widely used for hosting ML infrastructure and services

Azure.importance_reason: Strong enterprise adoption, integrated with Microsoft ecosystem

Google Cloud Platform.description: Google's suite of cloud computing services.
Google Cloud Platform.importance_reason: Strong AI/ML offerings including Vertex AI and TPUs

SQL.description: Standard language for managing and querying relational databases.
SQL.importance_reason: Essential for data access and analysis in any data-driven role

Git.description: Distributed version control system for tracking code changes.
Git.importance_reason: Universal tool for collaborative software development

Apache Spark.description: Unified analytics engine for large-scale data processing.
Apache Spark.importance_reason: Standard tool for processing big data in ML pipelines

Scikit-learn.description: Python library for classical machine learning algorithms.
Scikit-learn.importance_reason: Go-to library for traditional ML tasks in Python

JavaScript.importance_reason: Useful for AI engineers building full-stack AI applications

React.description: JavaScript library for building user interfaces.
React.importance_reason: Popular choice for building AI product frontends

REST API.description: Representational State Transfer - standard for web service APIs.
REST API.importance_reason: Standard way to expose ML models as services

Agile.description: Iterative approach to project management and software development.
Agile.importance_reason: Standard development methodology in tech companies

Scrum.description: Specific Agile framework for managing complex work.
Scrum.importance_reason: Widely adopted framework for engineering teams

System Design.description: Designing the architecture of complex software systems.
System Design.importance_reason: Critical for senior engineering roles and scalable ML systems
